L

loadSetting(AppCompatActivity, String, Switch) - Static method in class com.example.myapplication.GeolocationHelper
Loads the current geolocation setting from Firestore and sets the switch.
LocationHelper - Class in com.example.myapplication
Utility class for retrieving the device's last known location.
LocationHelper() - Constructor for class com.example.myapplication.LocationHelper
 
LocationHelper.LocationCallback - Interface in com.example.myapplication
 
LocationPickerDialog - Class in com.example.myapplication
A full-screen DialogFragment that displays an osmdroid map for picking a location.
LocationPickerDialog() - Constructor for class com.example.myapplication.LocationPickerDialog
 
LocationPickerDialog.OnLocationSelectedListener - Interface in com.example.myapplication
 
LotteryApp - Class in com.example.myapplication
Schedules LotteryDrawWorker as a PeriodicWorkRequest with KEEP policy so it is only ever enqueued once, no matter how many times the app is opened or the device is rebooted.
LotteryApp() - Constructor for class com.example.myapplication.LotteryApp
 
LotteryDrawHelper - Class in com.example.myapplication
Called by: - LotteryDrawWorker (PeriodicWorkRequest - scans all expired events every ~15 min) - WaitingListActivity lazy check Draw-once guarantee: a `drawCompleted` boolean on the event document is checked before every draw.
LotteryDrawHelper() - Constructor for class com.example.myapplication.LotteryDrawHelper
 
LotteryDrawHelper.OnDrawCompleteListener - Interface in com.example.myapplication
Callback so callers know whether the draw succeeded or was skipped.
LotteryDrawWorker - Class in com.example.myapplication
Scheduled once at app startup (via LotteryApp) as a PeriodicWorkRequest running approximately every 15 minutes.
LotteryDrawWorker(Context, WorkerParameters) - Constructor for class com.example.myapplication.LotteryDrawWorker
